label: Need
description: Defines a pawn need, including eligibility rules, UI behavior, and level change behavior.

needClass.label: Need class
needClass.description: C# Need subclass that implements this need's runtime behavior. Required by RimWorld; omitting it is a config error.

minIntelligence.label: Min intelligence
minIntelligence.description: Minimum Intelligence level a pawn must have for this need to apply. Defaults to Animal.

colonistAndPrisonersOnly.label: Colonists and prisoners only
colonistAndPrisonersOnly.description: If true, this need only applies to colonists and prisoners, not visitors or other pawns.

playerMechsOnly.label: Player mechs only
playerMechsOnly.description: If true, this need only applies to player-controlled mechanoids.

colonistsOnly.label: Colonists only
colonistsOnly.description: If true, this need only applies to colonists, excluding prisoners and guests.

slavesOnly.label: Slaves only
slavesOnly.description: If true, this need only applies to slave pawns.

onlyIfCausedByHediff.label: Only if caused by hediff
onlyIfCausedByHediff.description: If true, this need is only instantiated when a hediff on the pawn causes it.

onlyIfCausedByGene.label: Only if caused by gene
onlyIfCausedByGene.description: If true, this need is only instantiated when a gene on the pawn causes it.

onlyIfCausedByTrait.label: Only if caused by trait
onlyIfCausedByTrait.description: If true, this need is only instantiated when a trait on the pawn causes it.

onlyIfCausedByIdeo.label: Only if caused by ideo
onlyIfCausedByIdeo.description: If true, this need is only instantiated when the pawn's ideoligion causes it.

neverOnPrisoner.label: Never on prisoner
neverOnPrisoner.description: If true, this need is never applied to prisoner pawns regardless of other eligibility rules.

neverOnSlave.label: Never on slave
neverOnSlave.description: If true, this need is never applied to slave pawns regardless of other eligibility rules.

titleRequiredAny.label: Title required (any)
titleRequiredAny.description: Royal titles of which the pawn must hold at least one for this need to apply.

hediffRequiredAny.label: Hediff required (any)
hediffRequiredAny.description: Hediffs of which the pawn must have at least one active for this need to apply.

nullifyingPrecepts.label: Nullifying precepts
nullifyingPrecepts.description: Precepts that suppress this need when held by the pawn's ideoligion.

requiredComps.label: Required comps
requiredComps.description: Comp properties that must be present on the pawn for this need to be instantiated. Evaluated when Anomaly is active.

developmentalStageFilter.label: Developmental stage filter
developmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) controlling which life stages this need applies to. Defaults to Child and Adult.

showOnNeedList.label: Show on need list
showOnNeedList.description: If true, this need appears in the pawn's needs tab. Defaults to true.

baseLevel.label: Base level
baseLevel.description: Starting level of this need when the pawn first spawns. Defaults to 0.5.

major.label: Major
major.description: If true, this need is treated as a major need and displayed more prominently in the needs UI.

listPriority.label: List priority
listPriority.description: Sort priority in the needs UI. Higher values appear earlier in the list.

tutorHighlightTag.label: Tutor highlight tag
tutorHighlightTag.description: Tag used by the tutorial system to highlight this need. Not a translated string.

showForCaravanMembers.label: Show for caravan members
showForCaravanMembers.description: If true, this need is shown in the caravan needs overview.

scaleBar.label: Scale bar
scaleBar.description: If true, the need bar is drawn with a scale indicator.

showUnitTicks.label: Show unit ticks
showUnitTicks.description: If true, unit tick marks are drawn on the need bar.

fallPerDay.label: Fall per day
fallPerDay.description: How much this need level falls per in-game day. Used by chemical-style needs. Defaults to 0.5.

seekerRisePerHour.label: Seeker rise per hour
seekerRisePerHour.description: Rate at which the Need_Seeker level rises per in-game hour when the seeker target is available.

seekerFallPerHour.label: Seeker fall per hour
seekerFallPerHour.description: Rate at which the Need_Seeker level falls per in-game hour when the seeker target is absent.

freezeWhileSleeping.label: Freeze while sleeping
freezeWhileSleeping.description: If true, this need level does not change while the pawn is sleeping.

freezeInMentalState.label: Freeze in mental state
freezeInMentalState.description: If true, this need level does not change while the pawn is in a mental state.
